items.name: Crimson-Desert-Trainer-KizarCore
items.description: 🏜️ KIZAR MENU for Crimson Desert is a powerful single-player trainer built for fast progression and cleaner combat. It includes features like infinite health, stamina and spirit, stronger damage, stat control, item or currency support and speed tweaks for a much more comfortable adventure. ⚡

items.name: Limbus-Company-Trainer-KizarVault
items.description: ⚔️ KIZAR MENU for Limbus Company is a sharp and stylish trainer made for smoother solo runs. It focuses on combat comfort with SP support, sinner stat boosts, safer fights, stronger damage output, resource help and other handy tools that make long battles and grind sections much easier. 🔥

items.name: Slay-The-Spire-2-Trainer-KizarNest
items.description: 🃏 KIZAR MENU for Slay the Spire 2 is a practical trainer designed to make every run more comfortable. It helps with HP, shield, energy, rewards, gold, shop freedom, battle flow and speed control, giving you a smoother deckbuilding experience with less frustration and more fun. 🎯

items.name: Warframe-Cheat-KizarPulse
items.description: 🚀 KIZAR MENU for Warframe is a fast-paced cheat focused on farming efficiency and combat comfort. It is built around health and energy support, stronger damage, grind reduction, pickup utility, smoother mission flow and extra helpers that make repetitive content feel much faster and cleaner. ⚙️

items.name: Politician
items.description: Modern WiFi auditing library for ESP32 using advanced 802.11 techniques. Captures WPA/WPA2/WPA3 handshakes via  PMKID extraction and CSA injection (bypasses PMF). Harvests enterprise credentials, supports dual-band  (2.4GHz/5GHz on ESP32-C6), exports to PCAPNG/Hashcat. Clean C++ API with 9 examples.
